---
title: "Gallery Video Hosting Probe"
toc: false
search: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow">
---

This temporary, unlisted page verifies self-hosted video playback on the
Gallery's actual GitHub Pages deployment.

```{=html}
<div style="max-width: 960px; margin-inline: auto;">
<video
  controls
  preload="metadata"
  playsinline
  poster="www/videos/hosting-probe/hosting-probe-poster.jpg"
  style="display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; background: #111;">
  <source
    src="www/videos/hosting-probe/hosting-probe.mp4"
    type="video/mp4">
  <track
    default
    kind="captions"
    srclang="en"
    label="English"
    src="www/videos/hosting-probe/hosting-probe.vtt">
  Your browser does not support embedded video.
  <a href="www/videos/hosting-probe/hosting-probe.mp4">
    Open or download the MP4 test file.
  </a>
</video>
</div>
```

The probe passes when the video plays with audio controls, supports seeking and
full-screen display, and offers the English caption track.
